title: Universal Home Black Stainless Steel Kitchen Knives Set 5 Knife Types 5 Piece
description:
Upgrade your kitchen knives with the Universal Home Black Stainless Steel Knife Set! This knife set comes with 5 different styles essential for all kitchens - a bread knife, a chef knife, a utility knife, a carving knife, and a paring knife. Each knife is constructed of durable stainless steel, so you can count on them to stand the test of time. This is a must-have knife set for beginners and advanced chefs alike!
